name: MAG-7 | 碳素纤维
descriptionEn: The CT-exclusive Mag-7 delivers a devastating amount of damage at close range. Its rapid magazine-style reloads make it a great tactical choice. It has been painted using a carbon fiber hydrographic over a graphite base coat. Just because I carried my team doesn't mean it wasn't a team effort - Rona Sabri, Rising Star
descriptionZh: 反恐精英专用的 Mag-7 带来毁灭性的近距离杀伤力。它快速的弹仓式装弹方式使其成为一个不错的战术选择。 这把武器以石墨为外表，然后使用碳素纤维的花纹进行了涂装。 虽因我独当一面，但不意味着这不是团队的功劳 - 明日之星罗纳.萨布里

name: MAG-7 | 坚固链甲
descriptionEn: The CT-exclusive Mag-7 delivers a devastating amount of damage at close range. Its rapid magazine-style reloads make it a great tactical choice. It has been painted with a semi-transparent hydrographic in a chainmail pattern over a silver base coat. Of all the members of The Phoenix, none are more loyal to Valeria than her bodyguard Naomi
descriptionZh: 反恐精英专用的 Mag-7 带来毁灭性的近距离杀伤力。它快速的弹仓式装弹方式使其成为一个不错的战术选择。 这把武器以银色为外表，使用链甲图案的半透明花纹进行了涂装。 在凤凰战士的所有成员中，没有比瓦莱里娅的保镖娜奥米更忠于瓦莱里娅的人了

name: MAG-7 | 硬水
descriptionEn: The CT-exclusive Mag-7 delivers a devastating amount of damage at close range. Its rapid magazine-style reloads make it a great tactical choice. It has been painted with a grey anodized pattern and finished with blue highlights. \"I wouldn't drink that\"
descriptionZh: 反恐精英专用的 Mag-7 带来毁灭性的近距离杀伤力。它快速的弹仓式装弹方式使其成为一个不错的战术选择。 涂有电镀灰色图案并饰有蓝色高光。 “我才不喝呢”

name: MAG-7 | 声纳
descriptionEn: The CT-exclusive Mag-7 delivers a devastating amount of damage at close range. Its rapid magazine-style reloads make it a great tactical choice. It has been lightly stenciled in turquoise. You're right, losing is a new experience for me – The Oni and The Valkyrie Part 2
descriptionZh: 反恐精英专用的 Mag-7 带来毁灭性的近距离杀伤力。它快速的弹仓式装弹方式使其成为一个不错的战术选择。 这把武器用蓝绿色进行了轻微地镂空。 你是对的，失败对我来说是种新的经历 –《鬼与女武神（下）》

name: MAG-7 | 海军之辉
descriptionEn: The CT-exclusive Mag-7 delivers a devastating amount of damage at close range. Its rapid magazine-style reloads make it a great tactical choice. An anodized navy blue VariCamo pattern has been applied. Why so blue?
descriptionZh: 反恐精英专用的 Mag-7 带来毁灭性的近距离杀伤力。它快速的弹仓式装弹方式使其成为一个不错的战术选择。 这把武器采用了阳极氧化的迷彩海军蓝图案。 为何如此郁郁寡欢？

name: MAG-7 | 金属 DDPAT
descriptionEn: The CT-exclusive Mag-7 delivers a devastating amount of damage at close range. Its rapid magazine-style reloads make it a great tactical choice. It has been painted using an urban Digital Disruptive Pattern (DDPAT) hydrographic over a metallic base coat.
descriptionZh: 反恐精英专用的 Mag-7 带来毁灭性的近距离杀伤力。它快速的弹仓式装弹方式使其成为一个不错的战术选择。 这把武器以金属为外表，然后使用都市数字迷彩（DDPAT）图案的花纹进行了涂装。

name: MAG-7 | 银质
descriptionEn: The CT-exclusive Mag-7 delivers a devastating amount of damage at close range. Its rapid magazine-style reloads make it a great tactical choice. It has been painted with a chrome base coat and candied in transparent silver anodized effect paint. There is beauty in simplicity - Franz Kriegeld, Phoenix Tactician
descriptionZh: 反恐精英专用的 Mag-7 带来毁灭性的近距离杀伤力。它快速的弹仓式装弹方式使其成为一个不错的战术选择。 这把武器使用铬外表，通过半透明的银质电镀处理进行了涂装。 寓美于简 - 凤凰战士战术家弗兰兹.库里哥德

name: MAG-7 | SWAG-7
descriptionEn: The CT-exclusive Mag-7 delivers a devastating amount of damage at close range. Its rapid magazine-style reloads make it a great tactical choice. It has been covered in monochromatic silver and black designs. You either have it or you don't
descriptionZh: 反恐精英专用的 Mag-7 带来毁灭性的近距离杀伤力。它快速的弹仓式装弹方式使其成为一个不错的战术选择。 这把武器覆盖着纯银与纯黑的设计图案。 领悟舍与得

name: MAG-7 | 外表生锈
descriptionEn: The CT-exclusive Mag-7 delivers a devastating amount of damage at close range. Its rapid magazine-style reloads make it a great tactical choice. This memento from Siege is still perfectly operational although the exterior surfaces have rusted. Scars build character
descriptionZh: 反恐精英专用的 Mag-7 带来毁灭性的近距离杀伤力。它快速的弹仓式装弹方式使其成为一个不错的战术选择。 这把来自围攻之势的纪念武器可以用一句话来形容：“败絮其外，金玉其中”。 疤痕塑造品格

name: MAG-7 | 天空守卫
descriptionEn: The CT-exclusive Mag-7 delivers a devastating amount of damage at close range. Its rapid magazine-style reloads make it a great tactical choice. It has been painted using a combination of subtly patterned hydrographics and dry-transfer decals of wings. Sometimes the wings of an angel don't mean salvation
descriptionZh: 反恐精英专用的 Mag-7 带来毁灭性的近距离杀伤力。它快速的弹仓式装弹方式使其成为一个不错的战术选择。 这把武器将精致的图案花纹和翅膀风格的干式转印贴花结合起来，然后进行了涂装。 有时天使的翅膀并不意味着救赎

name: MAG-7 | 鱼长梦短
descriptionEn: The CT-exclusive Mag-7 delivers a devastating amount of damage at close range. Its rapid magazine-style reloads make it a great tactical choice. It has been custom painted with a design depicting fish swimming into a person's mouth using an orange and black color palette. Gulp, gulp, gulp
descriptionZh: 反恐精英专用的 Mag-7 带来毁灭性的近距离杀伤力。它快速的弹仓式装弹方式使其成为一个不错的战术选择。 这把武器使用橙与黑的基调描绘了鱼群游入一个人的嘴里的图案进行了自定义涂装。 狼吞虎咽，咕噜，咕噜

name: MAG-7 | 北冥有鱼
descriptionEn: The CT-exclusive Mag-7 delivers a devastating amount of damage at close range. Its rapid magazine-style reloads make it a great tactical choice. It has been custom painted with a blue base and underwater creatures in the foreground. There's always a bigger, greener fish
descriptionZh: 反恐精英专用的 Mag-7 带来毁灭性的近距离杀伤力。它快速的弹仓式装弹方式使其成为一个不错的战术选择。 这把武器使用蓝色底色以及水中生物作为主视觉。 总有大鱼吃小鱼

name: MAG-7 | 钴核
descriptionEn: The CT-exclusive Mag-7 delivers a devastating amount of damage at close range. Its rapid magazine-style reloads make it a great tactical choice. It has been custom painted with a futuristic graphic design. Keep him safe, Carmen - The Valkyrie and The Paramour Part 1
descriptionZh: 反恐精英专用的 Mag-7 带来毁灭性的近距离杀伤力。它快速的弹仓式装弹方式使其成为一个不错的战术选择。 这把武器使用未来派的图案设计进行了自定义涂装。 卡门 ，保证他的安全 -《女武神与情夫（上）》

name: MAG-7 | 先见之明
descriptionEn: The CT-exclusive Mag-7 delivers a devastating amount of damage at close range. Its rapid magazine-style reloads make it a great tactical choice. This custom paint job features an octopus, asked to predict the outcome of a match, reaching for the \"win\" tablet. I've got a good feeling about this...
descriptionZh: 反恐精英专用的 Mag-7 带来毁灭性的近距离杀伤力。它快速的弹仓式装弹方式使其成为一个不错的战术选择。 这把武器的自定义涂装描绘了一只章鱼想要预测比赛结果，正伸出触手抓取“胜利”石碑。 对此，我已有良好的感觉……

name: MAG-7 | 炽热
descriptionEn: The CT-exclusive Mag-7 delivers a devastating amount of damage at close range. Its rapid magazine-style reloads make it a great tactical choice. It has been custom painted to look as though it just came out of the forge. Make some outlines of your own
descriptionZh: 反恐精英专用的 Mag-7 带来毁灭性的近距离杀伤力。它快速的弹仓式装弹方式使其成为一个不错的战术选择。 这把武器使用了自定义涂装，以让它看上去就像是刚刚锻造好的。 打造你的专属定制吧

name: MAG-7 | 石雕
descriptionEn: The CT-exclusive Mag-7 delivers a devastating amount of damage at close range. Its rapid magazine-style reloads make it a great tactical choice. It has been custom painted to give the illusion of a rock craving. Conflict existed since the first caveman learned how to pick up a rock – Booth, Arms Dealer
descriptionZh: 反恐精英专用的 Mag-7 带来毁灭性的近距离杀伤力。它快速的弹仓式装弹方式使其成为一个不错的战术选择。 这件武器的自定义涂装模仿了石雕图案与质感。 从第一个原始人学会捡石头开始，就有冲突与斗争了 - 军火商布兹

name: MAG-7 | 铋晶体
descriptionEn: The CT-exclusive Mag-7 delivers a devastating amount of damage at close range. Its rapid magazine-style reloads make it a great tactical choice. It has been custom painted to resemble iridescent bismuth crystals. Why are the rarest things the most beautiful?
descriptionZh: 反恐精英专用的 Mag-7 带来毁灭性的近距离杀伤力。它快速的弹仓式装弹方式使其成为一个不错的战术选择。 这把武器采用五光十色的铋晶体进行了自定义涂装。 为何最稀有的东西最美？

name: MAG-7 | 五指短剑
descriptionEn: The CT-exclusive Mag-7 delivers a devastating amount of damage at close range. Its rapid magazine-style reloads make it a great tactical choice. It has been custom painted with patterned glass panels and a red grip and pump. \"Whatever you paid for this, it wasn't enough\"
descriptionZh: 反恐精英专用的 Mag-7 带来毁灭性的近距离杀伤力。它快速的弹仓式装弹方式使其成为一个不错的战术选择。 这把武器带有红色握把和套筒，枪身绘有带图案的玻璃板。 “此枪无价”
